raw.message:
🎁 Experience the thrill of Deal or No Deal – exclusive to tombola! Ready to take on the challenge?
Win up to £1,000 for FREE! 💸
SMS opt in required. 18+ gambleaware.org. T&Cs Apply

hook.summary: A group of women react with suspense and joy as they reveal a £1,000 win on a mobile game.
hook.visual_action: Four women huddle around a phone; the screen shows 'Deal or No Deal' boxes opening to reveal a big win.

scene_flow: Suspenseful reveal of two boxes on a smartphone screen held by a group of women.
The group reacts with shock and excitement as the £1,000 prize is revealed.
Confetti animation and 'WINNER' text overlay the celebration.
Transition to a teal end card with promotional offers and a call to action.
audience_proxy: Casual adults in the UK aged 25-55 who enjoy game shows and mobile casino games.
